title: Coverage-matrix record (sources/coverage-matrix.jsonl; one row per nations.json nation_id)
description: DS-1 gate artifact. The tool enforces: exactly one row per denominator nation_id; any status other than not-yet-searched requires linked search/probe events in the access log.

status.description: 'searched-not-found' is never evidence a Nation lacks a policy

search_events.description: search/probe event_ids evidencing the sweep (empty only for not-yet-searched)

source_ids.description: Register records found for this Nation
